object_under_evaluation: ring-application discipline in multi-skill agent orchestration
claim_boundary: The agent supports only this bounded ring-application surface: explicit applicability map, honest apply-now versus defer-skip handling, execution-versus-closeout separation, and visible harvest check.
limitations: This report does not prove general planning quality.
This report does not prove global optimality of skill choice.
This report does not replace owner-layer governance or promotion review.

per_case_breakdown.applicability_map_signal: explicit apply_now, defer, and skip entries were present
per_case_breakdown.plane_split_signal: execution and closeout stayed visibly distinct
per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: The readout matched the session evidence and did not claim more than the map and closeout supported.

per_case_breakdown.applicability_map_signal: partial map present, but one likely skip remained only implicit
per_case_breakdown.plane_split_signal: execution and closeout were still visible as separate planes
per_case_breakdown.harvest_check_signal: no explicit harvest check was recorded even though a reusable candidate survived
per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: The polished recap outran the orchestration evidence because it implied a complete ring application without a visible harvest decision.

per_case_breakdown.applicability_map_signal: explicit map present with honest apply_now and defer handling
per_case_breakdown.plane_split_signal: execution, closeout, and harvest remained separate
per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: The readout stayed bounded and reviewable because it kept surviving candidates visible instead of burying them in recap prose.
